'''Knights of the Force Squad''' were a squad of five minor [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] who were present at the [[Battle of Mandalore (pre-Naboo)|Battle of Mandalore]] and fought on the side of the [[Republican Army]]. It is unknown if this squad survived for the final victory or not.
